title: Universal Tool High Speed Steel Step Drill Bits Locking Hex Shank Assorted - 3pc
description:
Punch perfect holes in just about any material with the Universal Tool Step Drill Bit Set! This set of steel step drill bits comes with 3 different bits, all with a number of assorted stepping ranges. These ranges include the 6 step bit (inches) - 3/16, 1/4, 5/16, 3/8, 7/16, 1/2, the 9 step bit (inches) - 1/4, 5/16, 3/8, 7/16, 1/2, 9/16, 5/8, 11/16, 3/4 and the 13 step bit (inches) - 1/8, 5/32, 3/16, 7/32, 1/4, 9/32, 5/16, 11/32, 3/8, 13/32, 7/16, 15/32, 1/2. The drill bits are constructed of durable steel so they will stand the test of time through many uses. This quality steel is ideal for punching holes through steel plates, sheet metal, stainless steel, aluminum, wood, copper, brass, plastic and more

Universal Tool High Speed Steel Step Drill Bits Locking Hex Shank Assorted - 3pc

Punch perfect holes in just about any material with the Universal Tool Step Drill Bit Set!

Key Features

  • High Speed Step Drill Set - 3 Sizes
  • 6 step bit: 3/16, 1/4, 5/16, 3/8, 7/16, 1/2 | 9 step bit - 1/4, 5/16, 3/8, 7/16, 1/2, 9/16, 5/8, 11/16, 3/4 | 13 step bit - 1/8, 5/32, 3/16, 7/32, 1/4, 9/32, 5/16, 11/32, 3/8, 13/32, 7/16, 15/32, 1/2
  • Constructed of Titanium Coated Steel
  • Reduces Heat & Friction Caused During Drilling
  • Stops w/ Each Step to Prevent Drilling Larger Holes than Intended

Product Specifications

  • MPN: UTSDBS3PC
  • UPC: 060886768944
  • Color: Gold
  • Size: Small

This set of steel step drill bits comes with 3 different bits, all with a number of assorted stepping ranges. These ranges include the 6 step bit (inches) - 3/16, 1/4, 5/16, 3/8, 7/16, 1/2, the 9 step bit (inches) - 1/4, 5/16, 3/8, 7/16, 1/2, 9/16, 5/8, 11/16, 3/4 and the 13 step bit (inches) - 1/8, 5/32, 3/16, 7/32, 1/4, 9/32, 5/16, 11/32, 3/8, 13/32, 7/16, 15/32, 1/2.

The drill bits are constructed of durable steel so they will stand the test of time through many uses. This quality steel is ideal for punching holes through steel plates, sheet metal, stainless steel, aluminum, wood, copper, brass, plastic and more. Since the bit stops with each step, you will be able to prevent drilling larger holes than intended. The titanium coat on the bits will lessen the heat and friction caused during drilling. Make sure to grab this set before your next project!
